title: premna procumbens
intro: Premna procumbens, also known as African tea tree or Indian bay leaf, is a plant species native to tropical Africa and Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for centuries due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Premna procumbens include reducing fever, treating respiratory issues, and aiding in digestion, as well as exhibiting antioxidant and anti-cancer properties. Premna procumbens can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or extracts, and is also used in traditional cooking and as a natural insect repellent.
